narrative:
Precinct Brunswick City 3-B (precinct in Medina County) has 1,378 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
